TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqCon-dialog4_robo_bakan_ape 2020s

S.FORM: uxe cbeyo a ita wa meepah meepah ta klaali kesao ta ho.
S.TRANSL: 不是...我們以前工作。我們來跟他說我們以前每天工作。
No...we worked in the past. Let’s tell him we used to work every day.

S.FORM: a cbeyo na.
S.TRANSL: 過去的時候。
In the past.

S.FORM: X cbeyo a meepah ta klaali ita na a ini ta gduru ma.
S.TRANSL: 從前我們每天工作，而且我們不休息。
In the past, we worked every day, and we did not take a rest.

S.FORM: e meyah ta sapah dungan mtahu ta puniq.
S.TRANSL: 我們回家，又要生火。
We came home and we made fire.

S.FORM: pure ta oyu pure ta ido t a trima ta laqi.
S.TRANSL: (然後)我們煮洗澡水和煮飯。我們給小孩洗澡。
And then we boil water and cooked rice. We bathed the children.

S.FORM: na un ma kika laqi ma taqi ta kika uqulun ido laqi han ma kika taqi bobo na.
S.TRANSL: 是這樣，小孩去睡覺，之前，我們給小孩子餵飯。然後小孩睡覺。
Yes, children went to sleep, and before that we fed children first. Then children slept.

S.FORM: so kiya ka kurusi so kiya a so kiya ka ndaan nami cbeyo.
S.TRANSL: 就是像那樣辛苦。那就是從前的經歷。
It was like that hard. That was our experience in the past.

S.FORM: X henu han robo.
S.TRANSL: Robo，那件事。
Robo, that thing.

S.FORM: kiya a henu han robo mssbarux ta klaali han ma.
S.TRANSL: 我們以前常常會交換工作。
We often exchanged labors in the past.

S.FORM: un kiya kiya a msbarux ta klaali qnburung kosuy han.
S.TRANSL: 我們常常割香茅草還工。
We often sheared lemon grass in return.

S.FORM: un a musa ta kn a kika smbarux hbaro seediq qnburung kosuy ma.
S.TRANSL: 很多人互相幫忙收割香茅草。
Many people helped each other shear lemon grass.

S.FORM: akedu bale a ma ta dekiru ciida robo ha kteetu a.
S.TRANSL: Robo，我們那時候怎麼能那樣？
Robo, how could we do that at that time?

S.FORM: un kiya han mkesa ini taapa rulu uri naqah elu duri ma.
S.TRANSL: 我們走上坡路。我們沒辦法搭車，路又很糟。
We walked on slopes. We could not take a car, and the road was lousy.

S.FORM: a ma uxe bale kangtang kiya di a.
S.TRANSL: 那真的不簡單。
That was really not easy.

S.FORM: uka ta kucu duri cbeyo a.
S.TRANSL: 以前也沒有鞋子。
There were no shoes in the past, either

S.FORM: musa a meepah na hadasi hadasi na hadasi duri.
S.TRANSL: 我們赤腳去工作。
We went to work barefoot.

S.FORM: cbeyo riyung kii han na.
S.TRANSL: 那是更早以前。
That was even farther in the past.

S.FORM: un ma wano kosuy tikuh a henu han bobo na de kika mhuma ta kesaba di ma.
S.TRANSL: 只有香茅草一點點那個，所以之後我們就種木薯。
Only lemon grass was a little..., so we grew cassavas afterwards.

S.FORM: un kesaba uhin ta tikuh cikau laqi de i bale ba kesaba ninenkang na.
S.TRANSL: 為了孩子的花費，我們努力工作。木薯每兩年才收成一次。
We worked as hard as possible so as to earn children’s allowance. We could only harvest cassavas once in two years.

S.FORM: un ga inu uka ta naq pila di ma ha tame na laqi gako di ma ppuuyas laqi do.
S.TRANSL: 讓孩子念書。
Let children study.

S.FORM: wada ta kariun icineng bale di na.
S.TRANSL: 真的我們沒有錢。為了讓小孩去學校讀書，我們一年就挖了。
We really had no money. To let children study at school, we dug (the cassavas) in only one year.

S.FORM: musa ta um kurusi kmari kesaba na.
S.TRANSL: 挖木薯很辛苦。
Digging cassavas was toilsome.

S.FORM: un a muhin ta han uka ta naq a un km maemotte ta kmbarux han duri ma.
S.TRANSL: 我們很努力。我們沒有，我們先借。
We made effort. We didn’t have and we borrowed it in advance.

S.FORM: wa ta hmuwa suku ciida ha.
S.TRANSL: 我們當時怎麼能那樣生活？
How could we live that way at that time?

S.FORM: lngelungun mu duri we ini asi maanu cbeyo duri msbarux ta ma lngelungun saya.
S.TRANSL: 我現在想起來。
Now I think.

S.FORM: qcurux mremun uqiun nanaq ma.
S.TRANSL: 我們只有吃鹹魚。
We only ate salty fish.

S.FORM: ini ku maanu maanu di ini kela ini kela mekan siyang na cbeyo.
S.TRANSL: 我們以前不知道要吃豬肉。
We could not buy pork in the past.

S.FORM: kuromane na ini ta bari siyang.
S.TRANSL: 我們之前不買豬肉。
We did not buy pork before.

S.FORM: mesa tumun kuromame.
S.TRANSL: Tumun說我們就像豆豉。
Tumun said we were like fermented soy beans.

S.FORM: dqeras gaga kelaun mu ini ekan siyang si tumun baisurin ado kmukan heya na.
S.TRANSL: Baisurin的Tumun說：「我知道沒吃豬肉的人。」因為他自己是閩南人。
Tumun, who was from Baisurin, said, “I know who does not eat pork,” because he was Southern Min.

S.FORM: a msresung dqeras hari hayan ini ekan siyang di.
S.TRANSL: 如果你沒吃豬肉，臉會乾癟。
If you don’t eat pork, the face will be shriveled.

S.FORM: a a un bale ba ini ekan siyang han.
S.TRANSL: 真的，沒吃豬肉的臉就乾乾的。
That’s true. The faces of those who did not eat pork were dry.

S.FORM: ini kela mari siyang cbeyo maanu kana ke.
S.TRANSL: 我們從前不知道要買豬肉。
We did not know to buy pork.

S.FORM: kiya ka kiya ka X kerung tikuh han haan psbegu duri ma.
S.TRANSL: 我們只好拿佛手柑煮湯。
We could only cook soup with chayote.

S.FORM: sama bale sama bale maanu qcurux mremun ma qcurux mremun psbegu na .
S.TRANSL: 我們用山萵苣和鹹魚煮湯。
We used wild lettuce and salty fish to cook soup.

S.FORM: kii kesaun maku a anaq so kiya mbeyax ta riyung peni robo ani ini ekan abura na.
S.TRANSL: 我認為，Robo，雖然我們不吃油，但還是很有力量。
I think, Robo, although we did not eat oil, we were still strong.

S.FORM: ini ma uka ka uka ta mesa imahe ta sino bbiyan duri ciida un uka uka mimah sino.
S.TRANSL: 那時候，我們也沒有人到傍晚就說「我們來喝酒吧！」
At that time, there was not anybody among us who said in the evening, “Let’s drink wine!”

S.FORM: hmuwa ka saya di.
S.TRANSL: 現在怎麼變成這樣。
What happened today?

S.FORM: bbiyan kiya ka mimah ipong dungan ptalang dara na mbeyah meepah si.
S.TRANSL: 黃昏又喝一罐，說促進血液循環。
In the evening, we drink one bottle again saying that this circulates the blood.

S.FORM: un kiya kiya dungus na ho ima naq mkela.
S.TRANSL: 那是它的目的嗎？誰知道。
Is that the purpose? Who knows.

S.FORM: kiya kiya ka dungus na han.
S.TRANSL: 這件事的目的就是那樣。
That is the purpose of this thing.

S.FORM: mama jiang yici dakis su dakis su sa.
S.TRANSL: 她說你的Dakis。
She said your Dakis.

S.FORM: dakis mu m dakis mu thei kari.
S.TRANSL: 我的Dakis很聽話。
My Dakis listens to my words.

S.FORM: malu riyung malu riyung malu riyung ciida ciida biciq ciida na biciq ciida na dooyung mu curi na mhulis riyung.
S.TRANSL: 他小時候，我抓他的小雞雞，他笑得很開心。
When he was little, I grabbed his penis, and he was laughing happily.
